artPrompt: An evocative scene of riotous generosity: a goblin flings fistfuls of glowing snacks into a churning crowd amid a feral town-square bonfire, the treats arcing in flame-orange streaks that double as falling embers, recipients foreshortened lunging toward the viewer. Sparks and confetti swirl against night-black smoke, torn blank bunting overhead, every face lit hungry and gleeful. Rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Free Snacks Policy
text:
Whenever one or more Goblins you control deal combat damage to a player, that player loses 1 additional life.
At the beginning of your end step, if you control four or more Goblins, draw a card.
flavorText: Vote-winning platform: a chip in every pot, a fire in every hall.
